text:
For record-breaking Beatrice Chebet, there's nothing for fulfilling than winning gold medal at the Paris Olympics.To her, it would be a perfect reward. Granted, she's been hogging the limelight lately especially after setting a world record in women's 10,000m at the Prefontaine Classic, but she's yearning for more.Get Full Access for Ksh299/WeekUncover the stories others won’t tell. title: Chebet dreams of bagging her first track Olympic gold medal
author: Dennis Okeyo
description: Chebet made history as the first ever woman to run 10,000m under 29 minutes as she clocked 28:54.14.
keywords: ["Beatrice Chebet","2024 Paris Olympics","Olympic Games","SJAK Sports Personality of the Month"]
